title: L'étoile de Valencia
writer: Rudolph Cartier, Otto Eis, Jean Galtier-Boissière
actors: Brigitte Helm, Jean Gabin, Raymond Aimos
plot: Because a sailor once told Pedro Savedra his wife Marion cheated on him he left her. Learning later that it was nothing but a practical joke, Pedro decides to find her and to win her back. He finally traces her in Palma de Mallorc...
